SEARCH
Package labbook_connect.labbook_connect

Class MyResource

java.lang.Object
labbook_connect.labbook_connect.MyResource
@Path("/connect") public class MyResource extends Object
REST endpoints of LabBook Connect used for analyzer management and HL7 exchanges.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final String
    APPLICATION_HL7_V2
    HL7 v2 payload media type (HAPI HL7 over HTTP).
    static final jakarta.ws.rs.core.MediaType
    APPLICATION_HL7_V2_TYPE
    MediaType instance for HL7 v2 payloads.

  • Field Details

    • APPLICATION_HL7_V2

      public static final String APPLICATION_HL7_V2
      HL7 v2 payload media type (HAPI HL7 over HTTP).
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • APPLICATION_HL7_V2_TYPE

      public static final jakarta.ws.rs.core.MediaType APPLICATION_HL7_V2_TYPE
      MediaType instance for HL7 v2 payloads.

  • Constructor Details

    • MyResource

      public MyResource()
      Default constructor.

  • Method Details

    • test

      @GET @Path("test") @Produces("text/plain") public String test()
      Returns the current Connect version (diagnostic endpoint).
      Returns:
      Version string.

    • getAnalyzerInfo

      @GET @Path("info/{id_analyzer}") @Produces("text/plain") public String getAnalyzerInfo(@PathParam("id_analyzer") String id_analyzer)
      Returns information string for the specified analyzer.
      Parameters:
      id_analyzer - Analyzer identifier.
      Returns:
      Analyzer information string or an error string.

    • isAnalyzerLoaded

      @GET @Path("is_analyzer_loaded/{id_analyzer}") @Produces("application/json") public jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response isAnalyzerLoaded(@PathParam("id_analyzer") String id_analyzer)
      Indicates whether the specified analyzer is currently loaded.
      Parameters:
      id_analyzer - Analyzer identifier.
      Returns:
      JSON response indicating load status.

    • load_analyzers

      @GET @Path("load_analyzers") @Produces("text/plain") public int load_analyzers()
      Reloads analyzer plugins at runtime. Intended for maintenance or diagnostic purposes only.
      Returns:
      Number of analyzers loaded.

    • list_analyzers_classes

      @GET @Path("list_analyzers_classes") @Produces("text/plain") public String list_analyzers_classes()
      Lists all available analyzer classes detected by Connect.
      Returns:
      One analyzer per line.

    • list_analyzers_loaded

      @GET @Path("list_analyzers_loaded") @Produces("text/plain") public String list_analyzers_loaded()
      Lists all analyzer instances currently loaded in Connect.
      Returns:
      One analyzer per line.

    • lab28

      @POST @Path("lab28/{id_analyzer}") @Consumes("text/plain") @Produces("text/plain") public jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response lab28(@PathParam("id_analyzer") String id_analyzer, InputStream bodyStream)
      Handles LAB-28 requests. Expects a raw HL7 message encoded in UTF-8 and preserves segment delimiters (\r).
      Parameters:
      id_analyzer - Analyzer identifier.
      bodyStream - Raw HL7 payload stream.
      Returns:
      HL7 response payload.

    • test_lab27

      @POST @Path("test_lab27") @Consumes("application/hl7-v2") @Produces("text/plain") public jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response test_lab27(String qbp_q11)
      Endpoint intended for testing and troubleshooting HL7 messages.
      Parameters:
      qbp_q11 - HL7 QBP^Q11 payload.
      Returns:
      Echo response.

    • test_lab29

      @POST @Path("test_lab29") @Consumes("application/hl7-v2") @Produces("text/plain") public jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response test_lab29(String oul_r22)
      Endpoint intended for testing and troubleshooting HL7 messages.
      Parameters:
      oul_r22 - HL7 OUL^R22 payload.
      Returns:
      Echo response.
